# Temple of the Golden Light

> A faith-based nonprofit free church in Candler, North Carolina (near Asheville),
> devoted to facilitating deep healing through sacred sound, cacao ceremony, and
> community gathering. Inclusive and non-denominational — everyone is welcome.

Temple of the Golden Light was founded by Brie (Bridget) and Bjorn. The community
gathers every Thursday evening in Candler, NC around sacred cacao and sacred sound:
a sound activation, devotional chanting, a short meditation, and a shared potluck.
The temple also holds periodic cacao and sound ceremonies and "deep dive" sound-and-
touch intensives, offers 1:1 unCoaching sessions, and is developing "Villaging Life,"
a 25-acre land project near Asheville for living in community. The church runs on
tax-deductible donations rather than fixed fees, working toward buying land and
building a physical temple.

## Pages
- Home: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/ — who we are and how to join
- Who We Are: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/who-we-are — beliefs, mission, roots
- Gatherings & Events: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/gatherings — weekly gathering + ceremonies
- unCoaching: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/uncoaching — 1:1 transformational sessions
- Villaging Life: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/villaging-life — the land/community vision
- Participate: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/participate — ways to get involved
- About: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/about — founders Brie & Bjorn
- Donate: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/donate — support the temple (tax-deductible)
- FAQ: https://templeofthegoldenlight.com/faq — common questions for newcomers

## Contact
- Email: brieandbjorn@gmail.com
- Location: 48 Long Cove Road, Candler, NC 28715, USA
- Weekly gathering: Thursdays 5:45-8:00pm ET, Candler, NC
- unCoaching booking: https://calendly.com/brieandbjorn/45min
